title: [LTL] Add optional clock operand to PastOp
body: Long-term aim is to get clock info out of Slang during SV ingestion to make clocking of LTL ops explicit instead of keeping around the vagueness in SV. This is a first step towards that that allows us to get it running on PastOp without breaking the existing uses (but hopefully eventually the clock operand will stop being optional)
